REQUEST_CHANGES
`cli/cmd/init.go:307` — `gitAdd := exec.Command("git", "add", ...)` not migrated to `gitpkg.Command`.

post-merge review: REQUEST_CHANGES
`cli/cmd/init.go:307` — `gitAdd := exec.Command("git", "add", ...)` not migrated to `gitpkg.Command`.
`cli/cmd/init.go:314` — `gitCommit := exec.Command("git", "commit", ...)` not migrated.
`cli/cmd/init.go:326` — `gitWorktreeCfg := exec.Command("git", "config", ...)` not migrated.
`cli/cmd/init.go:711` — `gitCmd := exec.Command("git", "rev-parse", "--git-dir")` not migrated.
Either migrate these four callsites in `init.go`, or amend the bead AC/description to explicitly exclude `init.go` alongside `install.go`.

APPROVE
Iter 1 closes the gap flagged by the prior review by migrating the four remaining `exec.Command("git", …)` callsites in `cli/cmd/init.go` to `gitpkg.Command`. Combined with the earlier 8481ade6 commit (agent_cmd, agent_workers, checkpoint, status, bead, doc, bead_review, log), all non-test cli/cmd/ git callsites now go through `gitpkg.Command`.
